Wolfenstein 3D: Path Traced
===========================

Run the wolf3d-pt executable in this folder. The shareware Episode 1 data and the
compiled shaders ship alongside it, so there is nothing else to install.

Requirements
------------
A GPU with Vulkan hardware ray tracing (VK_KHR_ray_query):
  * AMD RDNA2 or newer
  * NVIDIA RTX (20-series and up)
  * Intel Arc
Without one, the game still runs in the classic raycaster mode.

Controls
--------
  F8          toggle classic raycaster <-> path tracer (path traced by default)
  F7 / F9     toggle the side-by-side split comparison
  F5          save a screenshot
  Arrows/WASD move        Ctrl fire        Space open doors
  1-4         select weapon               Esc menu

The path tracer draws the exact same live game state as the original raycaster --
one simulation, two renderers.
